TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Lou_Boudreau, title = Lou_Boudreau, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lou_Boudreau} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1917 , ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 7, Lou Boudreau, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2001)
kawas tay 1917 , ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 7, Lou Boudreau, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2001)
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, lou βou*reau, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****)
